items.title: Traceability & Spec Control Hub
items.description: Traceability & Spec Control Hub exists to Stabilize the data and evidence backbone behind specifications, supplier changes, and compliance artifacts so platform reliability improves without manual audit reconstruction. The quarter concentrates on traceability, formulation governance, quality-by-design, and sustainability evidence so the work reads like a realistic OKR-driven investment set for a company with roughly 250 product and technology people.

customerKPIs.expectedImpact: Increase operational reliability of the landscape by strengthening spec exchange, evidence controls, and platform observability and making the core workflow more reliable end to end.
Increase availability & performance by strengthening spec exchange, evidence controls, and platform observability and making the core workflow more reliable end to end.

businessKPIs.expectedImpact: Increase arr by strengthening spec exchange, evidence controls, and platform observability and making the core workflow more reliable end to end.

productBricks.change: Extended Supplier Onboarding & Qualification with domain-specific workflow improvements.
Extended Spec Exchange & Change Notifications with domain-specific workflow improvements.
Extended Spec Management (Product & Material) with domain-specific workflow improvements.
Extended Document & Certificate Center with domain-specific workflow improvements.

deliveryChannels.change: Introduced workflow updates in Supplier Spec API.
Introduced workflow updates in Change Notification API.

discoveryLinks.discoveryName: Traceability & Spec Control Hub: operating discovery

items.title: Margin & Customer Assurance Workspace
items.description: Margin & Customer Assurance Workspace exists to Give leaders a tighter view of margin, service cost, and customer assurance so commercial tradeoffs stay grounded in reliable operational evidence. The quarter concentrates on traceability, formulation governance, quality-by-design, and sustainability evidence so the work reads like a realistic OKR-driven investment set for a company with roughly 250 product and technology people.

customerKPIs.expectedImpact: Increase gross margin stability by strengthening customer-specific specs, order transparency, and margin visibility workflows and making the core workflow more reliable end to end.
Increase cost-to-serve visibility by strengthening customer-specific specs, order transparency, and margin visibility workflows and making the core workflow more reliable end to end.

businessKPIs.expectedImpact: Increase arr by strengthening customer-specific specs, order transparency, and margin visibility workflows and making the core workflow more reliable end to end.

productBricks.change: Extended Customer-Specific Product Catalog & Specs with domain-specific workflow improvements.
Extended Customer Order Self-Service with domain-specific workflow improvements.
Extended Document & Certificate Center with domain-specific workflow improvements.
Extended Service & Case Management (Lite) with domain-specific workflow improvements.

deliveryChannels.change: Introduced workflow updates in Customer Order API.
Introduced workflow updates in Documents API.
